name: Vanilla Pudding and Pie Filling Mix (M-a-m)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl until well combined.
2. Transfer the mixture to a 4-cup container for storage.
3. Use within 4 months of preparation.
4. This mix can replace pudding in various recipes, such as Boston Cream Pie, Creamy Vanilla Pudding, Layered Vanilla Cream, Sour Cream and Raisin Pie, and Vanilla Cream Pie.
